calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-15-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Saleh Elhattab Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per.
Donald Jans Defendant/Appellant in Pro Per.

Parties are sworn.

Saleh Elhattab Plaintiff/Respondent testifies on his own behalf.
Donald Jans Defendant/Appellant states that the matter is past the statute of limitations deadline.

Plaintiff/Respondent introduces the following exhibit:
Exhibit 1: Statue of limitations timeline

The Court will hear the Statute of Limitation issue before hearing the case.
The Court takes the issue of the statute of limitations under submission.

Saleh Elhattab Plaintiff/Respondent testifies on his own behalf.
Plaintiff/Respondent introduces the following exhibit:
Exhibit 2: Evidence Packet (30 pages)

Donald Jans Defendant/Appellant testifies on his own behalf.
Defendant/Appellant introduces the following exhibit:
Exhibit A: Photographs as to the cleaning of the apartment.

At the close of the hearing, the Court tentatively rules as follows:

The Statute of limitations issue is taken under submission, The Court is inclined to exclude rental costs from the deposit deductions but is taking the cleaning costs under submission.

The Court allows both parties closing remarks.

Exhibits are retained the Court.

Judge: Victor M. Hwang, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (210).
